revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''3-2-050

Alternative terms: Stacked array (U.S.A.), Vertical stack (G.B.)

An assembly of sound emitters, mounted vertically one above the other and so spaced and excited as to concentrate their power in the horizontal direction.

{{IALAFooter}}
